overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city plaza at night, featuring neon-lit billboards, wet reflective surfaces, palm trees, and scattered NPCs. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), showcasing high-quality rendered graphics with dense urban architecture and atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with digital billboards and palm trees

events.description: moving from the palm tree seating area into the main covered pedestrian walkway
approaching two pedestrians walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered pedestrian mall, passing by a large glass terrarium structure on the left

notable_agents.action: person in red hood sitting on bench looking at a device

entered.detail: tall palm trees in planters along the right side of the walkway
small blue cylindrical structure with glass windows, possibly a vendor booth
large rectangular glass enclosure with plants inside, illuminated from within
multiple large digital screens suspended between buildings displaying advertisements
concrete bench with a person sitting wearing a red hood
scattered trash bags and debris along the left building wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered pedestrian walkway at night, lined with palm trees and neon signage. The camera moves forward past a large glass terrarium and a blue kiosk structure, with digital billboards visible overhead. A person sits on a bench to the right as the camera approaches two pedestrians in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: main pedestrian thoroughfare with bank signage and central fountain plaza

events.description: passing by two pedestrians walking toward the camera
passing the illuminated bank sign and entering the fountain plaza area

agents.ego_description: continuing through the plaza, passing pedestrians and approaching the central fountain area with illuminated benches

notable_agents.action: pedestrian carrying a glowing red umbrella walking toward the camera
pedestrian in white outfit walking beside the umbrella carrier

entered.detail: large illuminated sign with pink neon letters spelling BANK on the building facade
open plaza area with a central water feature and illuminated edges
modern benches with built-in lighting along the base

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the main thoroughfare, passing two pedestrians walking with a glowing red umbrella. The neon BANK sign becomes prominent on the left as the scene opens into a fountain plaza with illuminated benches. Trash debris lines the left wall while palm trees continue along the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial plaza with ZETATECH storefront and subway entrance approach

events.description: ZETATECH storefront with yellow neon signage comes into view on the right
slight turn toward the subway entrance gates at the end of the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking past the ZETATECH store and illuminated benches, heading toward the subway entrance at the end of the walkway

notable_agents.action: person sitting on illuminated bench on the right side of the walkway

entered.detail: storefront with large yellow neon ZETATECH sign and glass windows
subway station entrance with turnstiles and green neon lighting
tall digital billboard displaying advertisements on the right side

segments.scene_description: The camera continues through the plaza as the ZETATECH storefront becomes prominent on the right. The subway entrance with its turnstiles and green lighting is visible ahead. A person sits on an illuminated bench to the right, and the fountain plaza recedes into the background as the camera approaches the subway gates.

scene_state.functional_zone: subway station entrance with turnstiles and towering building facade

events.description: approaching the subway turnstile gates at the end of the pedestrian walkway
camera tilts upward to look at the large billboard on the building facade above

agents.ego_description: approaching the subway entrance gates, then looking up at the towering building and billboard above the station entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead toward the subway turnstiles

entered.detail: row of subway turnstiles with green illuminated signs above them
massive digital billboard mounted on the building facade above the subway entrance
escalator leading down into the subway station
tall building with glass windows and structural elements on the left side

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the subway station entrance with its turnstiles and green neon lighting. The ZETATECH store and plaza benches fall behind as the scene becomes more enclosed. A pedestrian walks ahead toward the gates, and the camera tilts upward to reveal a massive digital billboard on the towering building facade above the subway entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit pedestrian walkway that gradually opens into a wide plaza before narrowing into a subway entrance. It begins under a covered walkway lined with palm trees and digital billboards, gliding past a glass terrarium and a blue kiosk toward distant pedestrians. As the camera moves into the main thoroughfare, the space expands into a fountain plaza where a glowing red umbrella and a prominent neon bank sign emerge from the urban clutter. The scene then shifts toward the ZETATECH storefront and illuminated benches, with the open plaza receding as the camera approaches the green lighting of the subway turnstiles. Finally, the environment becomes more enclosed at the station gates before the camera tilts upward to reveal a massive digital billboard towering over the entrance.
